name: tool_output
description: Fetch the output of a backgrounded tool call (one spawned with `run_in_background=true`). Pass the `task_id` you received when the task was started. By default returns the full accumulated output; set `delta=true` to receive only the new bytes since your last fetch.

task_id.description: The task_id you received when you spawned the background tool.

delta.description: If true, return only the bytes added since the last call for this task_id. Default false (returns full output).
